sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109133" key="u(poskepa/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποσκεπάω</orth>, <sense id="n109133.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">conceal, hide,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0579.tlg001:5:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hymn.Mag.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
